# WeekFit

> Your AI coach, powered by Apple Health. One clear call for today — what to do now, why it matters, and how to adjust. Private on your iPhone.

## Entity

- Product: WeekFit
- Developer: WeekFit
- Platform: iPhone (iOS)
- Category: AI fitness coach
- Data source: Apple Health
- Price: Free
- Status: Available on the App Store

## Capabilities

- Recovery score from sleep, HRV and resting heart rate
- Activity and workouts synced from Apple Health
- Nutrition and macro tracking in daily context
- AI Coach: daily guidance from combined health signals
- Weekly workout planning

## Install

- App Store: https://weekfit.app/download/
- (Set apps.apple.com/app/id… in site config at release)

## Social

- Instagram: https://weekfit.app/instagram/

- Preferred source deeplink: https://google.com/preferences/source?q=weekfit.app

- support@weekfit.app

## Index

- Sitemap: https://weekfit.app/sitemap.xml

## Note

WeekFit provides fitness and wellness guidance, not medical advice.
